title: lastrea protensa
intro: Lastrea protensa, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a type of fern native to Asia and is characterized by its unique shield-shaped fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea protensa include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Lastrea protensa are typically made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
